expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Invite members, change roles, revoke access, and audit membership changes",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Invite member by email",
      "description": "As an admin, I can invite a member by email so they receive an invite link and join the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite endpoint sends email with invite link",
        "Invite token expires appropriately",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/inviteService.ts",
        "src/routes/invite.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Change member role",
      "description": "As an admin, I can change a member's role between viewer, editor, admin so permissions update.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI and API to change role",
        "Permissions enforcement updated",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/MemberRow.tsx",
        "src/services/roleService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As an admin, I can revoke a member's access so former members cannot sign in.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Revoke action invalidates sessions/tokens",
        "Audit log entry created",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/services/membershipService.ts",
        "src/routes/membership.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Audit log and recent membership view",
      "description": "As an admin, I can review recent membership changes and audit details in workspace settings.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Audit entries recorded for invites, role changes, revokes",
        "Settings page shows recent membership changes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/WorkspaceSettings.tsx",
        "src/services/auditService.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
